name: Okta Network Zone Deletion Events (30 days)
description: Detects successful Okta network zone deletion events that can remove geo/IP-based access restrictions.
query: SELECT l.uuid AS id, l.actor_id, COALESCE(actor.login, actor.email, l.actor_id, l.actor_type, 'unknown') AS actor_name, l.target_id, l.target_type, l.event_type, l.outcome, l.published FROM okta_system_logs l LEFT JOIN okta_users actor ON actor.id = l.actor_id WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(l.event_type, '')) = 'zone.delete' AND LOWER(COALESCE(l.outcome, 'success')) IN ('success', 'allow', 'allowed') AND l.published >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() - INTERVAL '30 days'
remediation: Restore unauthorized network zone deletions, validate zone allow/deny policies, and restrict network-zone administration to approved operators.
